---
title: "Gwendolen or Gwendolene Violet Yonge"
---

## Gwendolen or Gwendolene Violet Yonge

### Description

adopted daughter of Francis Arthur Yonge

### Biography

She proved his will; she was married to a man named Jones.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 20th [1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
